title: CoffeeG's Colorful World
description: > Add `jeb_` name tag for Cat,Axolotl and much more! Not just sheep!
body:
# CoffeeG's Colorful World
> Add bunch of features to enchances vanilla experiences

## Features
+ Provide a small luck buff while fishing with cat(s) sitting nearby
+ Add `jeb_` nametag for Axolotl , Cat, Tropical Fish . Not just sheep!
> Demo

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vv3BpokYNwE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>





## Support
+ From `1.14 -> up`
+ Platform : Datapack , Mod [ (Neo)Forge, Fabric, Quilt ]

# Author
Made with love by CoffeeG
